title: Columns created through WorkForms do not trigger webhook
excerpt: When adding columns to a board through the WorkForms builder, Monday does not send any column created webhooks. Is this the intended behavior, or is it a potential bug?

posts.author: jeffg (Jeff Gordon)
posts.cookedHtml: When adding columns to a board through the WorkForms builder, Monday does not send any column created webhooks. Is this the intended behavior, or is it a potential bug?

posts.author: alessandra (Alessandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Jeff,

Thanks for raising this issue! I’ll investigate this behavior and get back to you with more details soon.
